title: 9 Natural Essential Oils for Runners with Knee Swelling
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra essential oils, also known as licorice root essential oil, may help alleviate knee swelling due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains constituents like glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Glycyrrhizin, in particular, has been found to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to swelling and pain.
